# Royal Mercaderistas Frontend Instructions

## Objective
Keep sessions short, focused, and task-driven.

## Workflow
- Work on one clear task at a time.
- Read only the files needed for the current task.
- Avoid broad repository scans unless explicitly requested.
- Limit each implementation step to small, verifiable changes.

## Communication
- Respond in concise Spanish by default.
- First provide the direct result, then only essential details.
- If information is missing, ask a single concrete question.

## Code Changes
- Reuse existing project patterns before introducing new abstractions.
- Avoid large refactors while fixing a specific bug.
- Update only the minimal set of files required for the task.

## Validation
- Prefer quick, targeted checks over full-suite runs for small changes.
- Report what was validated and what could not be validated.
